title: pelargonium × pygmaeum
intro: Pelargonium × pygmaeum, a dwarf cultivar of the pelargonium plant species, is a type of succulent that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and colds, due to its high concentration of rosmarinic acid and other antioxidants. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pygmaeum include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. Pelargonium × pygmaeum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and home remedies.
